title: App Service does not enforce HTTPS
remediation: Enable HTTPS Only for the App Service.

title: SSH/RDP is open to the internet
remediation: Restrict management access to VPN, privileged access workstations, or just-in-time access.

title: Business-critical production workload has a public IP
remediation: Place sensitive workloads behind a load balancer, private endpoint, VPN, or application gateway where possible.

title: SQL public network access is enabled
remediation: Use private endpoints and disable public network access where possible.

title: Public blob access is enabled
remediation: Disable public blob access unless there is a documented business requirement.

title: Secure transfer is not enforced
remediation: Require HTTPS-only traffic for the storage account.

title: Unencrypted FTP is allowed
remediation: Set FTPS state to FtpsOnly or Disabled.

title: App Service minimum TLS is below 1.2
remediation: Set the minimum TLS version to 1.2 or higher.

title: Key Vault purge protection is disabled
remediation: Enable purge protection for production vaults.

title: SQL minimum TLS is below 1.2
remediation: Require TLS 1.2 or higher for database connections.

title: SQL auditing is disabled
remediation: Enable auditing and route logs to an approved monitoring destination.

title: Minimum TLS version is below TLS1_2
remediation: Set the minimum TLS version to TLS1_2 or higher.
